companies.name: LLM Stats
companies.oneLiner: Independent AI evaluations lab
companies.longDescription:
We build independent and contamination-proof benchmarks that measure real world performance.

LLM Stats is the most complete LLM leaderboard. We have the most complete archive of LLM benchmark results and also run independent evaluations that are not the classical ones that are already in the training data of most models.

Our mission: become the biggest community dedicated to AI transparency.

companies.name: compliant-llm
companies.oneLiner: Detect every data leak into third-party GenAI tools
companies.longDescription:
CompliantLLM detects every data leak into third-party GenAI tools used in your company by monitoring employee interactions.

Security and tech leaders get visibiliity and control over the data flowing into various Gen AI apps used in their organizations.

companies.name: Paper Instruments
companies.oneLiner: Frontier models and software for knowledge work
companies.longDescription: Paper Instruments post-trains LLMs to accelerate knowledge work.

companies.name: Compresr
companies.oneLiner: LLM context compression for better accuracy
companies.longDescription: Compresr provides an API that compresses LLM context without losing what matters. It’s a drop-in for agents and RAG that cuts token costs and improves accuracy.

companies.name: PromptArmor
companies.oneLiner: LLM Security and Compliance

companies.name: Lexter.ai
companies.oneLiner: LLM for Legal in Brazil
companies.longDescription: Lexter is the first legal LLM company in Brazil, already working with 3 out of the top 5 law firms in the Country
locations: São Paulo, State of São Paulo, Brazil

companies.name: Helicone
companies.oneLiner: LLM Observability for Developers
companies.longDescription:
Helicone.ai is creating an advanced observability platform tailored for developers working with Large Language Models (LLMs). Our goal is to simplify and enhance the operational side of deploying these models, making it easier for developers to monitor, manage, and optimize their AI applications at scale. Helicone provides a unified view of performance, cost, and user interaction metrics for various LLM providers, like OpenAI, Anthropic, and LangChain, empowering developers to make their LLM deployments more efficient, reliable, and cost-effective.

### Key Features

1. **Centralized Observability**: Our platform captures and visualizes detailed logs and metrics across all LLM deployments. With tools for prompt management, performance tracing, and debugging, Helicone provides real-time insights into the inner workings of your LLMs.

2. **LLM Performance Optimization**: Helicone supports prompt experimentation, success rate tracking, and fine-tuning, allowing you to continuously improve response quality and efficiency. This level of insight makes it easier to deliver high-performing, cost-effective AI applications.

3. **Flexible Data Management**: We understand that data privacy is critical. Helicone supports deployment options for dedicated instances, hybrid cloud integrations, or self-hosted environments, allowing clients to maintain control over their data and ensuring compliance with privacy standards.

### Built for Developers and Data Scientists

Helicone is designed to meet the needs of engineers and data scientists who require transparency and control over their LLMs. From chatbots to document processing systems, Helicone equips you with the insights needed to track costs, understand user interactions, and optimize outputs—all from one intuitive platform.

By combining observability with LLM-specific insights, Helicone is redefining AI monitoring, empowering developers to deploy and scale their AI models with confidence.

companies.name: Confident AI
companies.oneLiner: The LLM Eval and Observability Platform for AI Quality
companies.longDescription: Confident AI provides enterprises an all-in-one platform to evaluate, observe, red team, and govern AI applications. Built by the creators of DeepEval (16k stars, 8m monthly downloads), Confident AI is able to offer battle-tested, open-source evaluation algorithms while providing the infrastructure needed for teams to stay confident their AI systems.

companies.name: Quetzal
companies.oneLiner: Simple, LLM-first translation and internationalization for software
companies.longDescription: Quetzal is the first fully LLM-powered translation and internationalization suite, enabling companies to translate and internationalize their software and content instantly with minimal setup. We also handle all of your internationalization issues, from managing all of your stakeholders to bringing your product and marketing to market. No more waiting days or even weeks for translated content! Deliver a perfect experience to your users in any language, instantly.

companies.name: Armilla AI
companies.oneLiner: AI/LLM Assessment & Warranty Solutions
companies.longDescription:
Using industry-leading AI/LLM evaluation technology, Armilla AI provides third-party AI assessment and warranty solutions, backed by leading reinsurers Swiss Re, Greenlight Re and Chaucer. Vendors of AI-powered products leverage Armilla’s assessment to anticipate customer questions, respond to enterprise RFPs, meet regulatory requirements, build trust in the reliability of their solutions - and ultimately, to accelerate sales. 

Armilla’s clients include enterprises along with AI-first start ups & scale ups in Fintech, Insurtech, Healthtech, Legaltech, HRtech & more.

companies.name: BricksAI
companies.oneLiner: Streamlining LLM application management for enterprises
companies.longDescription:
BricksAI is an open-source AI gateway that helps you manage how each of your services is calling different LLM providers.

You can create API keys with rate-limits, spend-limits, and expiration dates, then use them to make requests to different LLMs. With our SSO dashboard, you also get (1) role-based access control, and (2) fine-grained metrics (e.g. cost, number of requests, tokens) over each API key.

companies.name: Downlink
companies.oneLiner: Make your LLMs 3x faster.
companies.longDescription:
Downlink is a platform that continuously improves your AI.

Boost rate limits, slash latency, and raise accuracy.All through one simple API.

companies.name: LiteLLM
companies.oneLiner: Call every LLM API like it's OpenAI [100+ LLMs]
companies.longDescription:
LiteLLM is an open-source LLM Gateway with 18K+ stars on GitHub and trusted by companies like Rocket Money, Samsara, Lemonade, and Adobe. LiteLLM provides an open source Python SDK and Python FastAPI Server that allows calling 100+ LLM APIs (Bedrock, Azure, OpenAI, VertexAI, Cohere, Anthropic) in the OpenAI format

We have raised a $1.6M seed round from Y Combinator, Gravity Fund and Pioneer Fund

companies.name: Query Vary
companies.oneLiner: No-Code LLM Application / Workflow Builder
companies.longDescription:
Query Vary is a no-code tool for building LLM-powered automation. 

Example use cases include extracting information from a sales call transcript and piping it into a CRM, creating a Slack bot trained on product documentation, or transforming Google forms into fully formatted reports.

Input Software --> LLM --> Output Software

Our extensive toolset to make each workflow reliable sets Query Vary apart. 

Book a demo:
https://calendar.app.google/6oxEvZA2k4kK6dBa8

companies.name: Chatter
companies.oneLiner: Dead simple LLM testing and iteration
companies.longDescription: Chatter is Postman for LLMs. Our platform helps companies and developers test their LLM models. Iterate on prompts, run them across model families and evaluate them against test cases – all in one place. With collaboration features, engineers can design LLM chains while QA can write test cases.

companies.name: Langfuse
companies.oneLiner: Open source LLM engineering platform
companies.longDescription:
Traces, evals, prompt management and metrics to debug and improve your LLM application.
Onboard via https://langfuse.com

Langfuse helps you build and improve LLM applications across the entire lifecycle: 
- Develop: Observability, Langfuse UI & Prompt Management
- Monitor: Traces, Analytics, Metrics & Evaluations
- Test: Experiments, Releases & Datasets

We are hiring: https://langfuse.com/careers

Langfuse was acquired by Clickhouse in January of 2026.

companies.oneLiner: The API for LLM tool use

companies.name: Traceloop
companies.oneLiner: Know what your LLM is doing — and why it’s failing
companies.longDescription: Traceloop gives you full visibility into every prompt, response, and failure. Track quality, detect drift, and stop hallucinations before they reach your users. Powered by OpenTelemetry, integrated in one line.

companies.name: Humanloop
companies.oneLiner: Humanloop is the LLM evals platform for enterprises.
companies.longDescription: Humanloop is the LLM evals platform for enterprises. Teams at Gusto, Vanta and Duolingo use Humanloop to ship reliable AI products. We enable you to adopt best practices for prompt management, evaluation and observability.

companies.name: The Token Company
companies.oneLiner: Compression middleware that improves LLM outputs
companies.longDescription:
Compression middleware that removes context bloat in milliseconds, lowering costs and improving end-to-end latency.

Compression is especially effective across natural language workloads. In a blind LLM arena case study with one of our customers, compressed requests increased user preference, lowered costs, and lifted purchase volume by 5%.
